sections.title: Three commands to publish
sections.description: Every command runs in Claude Code. No browser canvas, no chat UI.

items.title: Sign in
items.description: Run /mcp once per machine. Authorize in the browser; Claude Code captures the OAuth token.

items.title: Create the site
items.description: /new my-landing-page seeds an initial page + reserves my-landing-page.supa.page.

items.title: Edit + publish
items.description: Edit via /edit-page, /edit-post, /update-theme. /publish promotes drafts to main; the live URL updates immediately.
